data.subject: Team Sync - Wednesday 2pm
data.textBody:
Hi team,

Reminder: We have our weekly team sync this Wednesday, April 8th at 2:00 PM EST.

Agenda:
1. Sprint retro (15 min)
2. Demo of new search feature (20 min)
3. Discuss on-call rotation changes (10 min)
4. Open floor (15 min)

Please come prepared with your sprint updates.

Meeting link: https://meet.google.com/abc-defg-hij

— Henry
